pages.title: Preparation is Key
pages.text: Fighting a boss without preparation is suicide. Before engaging:$(br2)$(li)Bring your best gear-enchanted diamond minimum$(li)Pack golden apples, potions, and food$(li)Clear the area of normal mobs first$(li)Have an escape route planned$(li)Bring friends if possible$(br2)Bosses can have 10x normal health and 5x damage. Respect them.

pages.title: Reading Boss Bars
pages.text: Boss bars display:$(br2)$(li)Custom boss name$(li)Current health percentage$(li)Different colors for different threat tiers$(br2)If multiple bosses are nearby, you'll see multiple bars. This is your cue to either be a legend or run away.$(br2)$(o)Some bosses are designed for group content-don't try to solo everything.

pages.title: Loot and Rewards
pages.text: Bosses justify their danger through rewards:$(br2)$(li)Massive experience drops$(li)Custom loot tables$(li)Rare items configured by server$(li)Guaranteed valuable drops$(br2)The best gear often comes from defeating the strongest foes. Risk vs. reward is the name of the game.

pages.title: When to Retreat
pages.text: Not every fight is winnable:$(br2)$(li)If you're undergeared for the area$(li)If multiple bosses spawn together$(li)If environmental hazards complicate things$(li)If potions and food are running low$(br2)Live to fight another day. Bosses that spawn naturally will respawn eventually-prepare better and return.
